ddls:
CREATE TABLE "earthquake_ruptures" (
  "rupture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each earthquake rupture */,
  "fault_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the faults table */,
  "magnitude" REAL /* Magnitude of the earthquake rupture */,
  "hypo_depth" REAL /* Depth of the earthquake rupture hypocenter */,
  "rupture_date" TEXT /* Date of the earthquake rupture */,
  "rupture_time" TEXT /* Time of the earthquake rupture */,
  "rupture_mechanism" TEXT /* Type of rupture mechanism (e.g., normal, reverse, strike-slip) */,
  "rupture_length" REAL /* Length of the rupture in kilometers */,
  "rupture_width" REAL /* Average width of the rupture in kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rupture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_earthquake_ruptures_fault_id FOREIGN KEY ("fault_id") REFERENCES faults ("fault_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ground_motion_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ground motion parameter */,
  "rupture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the earthquake rupture associated with the parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of ground motion parameter (e.g., PGV, PGA, SA) */,
  "parameter_value" REAL /* Value of the ground motion parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the ground motion parameter (e.g., cm/s, g, s) */,
  "parameter_uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty associated with the ground motion parameter */,
  "parameter_units" TEXT /* Units of the ground motion parameter (e.g., cm/s, g, s) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_conditions" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "vs30" REAL /* Average shear-wave velocity in the top 30 meters (Vs30) */,
  "site_elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site in meters */,
  "site_geology" TEXT /* Geology of the site (e.g., rock, soil, alluvium) */,
  "site_soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil at the site (e.g., clay, sand, silt) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distances" (
  "distance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distance */,
  "rupture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the earthquake rupture */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance between the earthquake rupture and the site */,
  "distance_type" TEXT /* Type of distance calculation (e.g., epicentral, hypocentral, rupture distance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "result_types" (
  "result_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result type */,
  "result_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the result type (e.g., MEAN, MAX, MIN) */,
  "result_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the result type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "rupture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the earthquake rupture */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ground motion parameter */,
  "result_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result type */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the analysis result */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher, guest) */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., institution, organization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the data format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data format */,
  "format_description" TEXT /* Description of the data format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "rupture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the earthquake rupture */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ground motion parameter */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data format */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the data file */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the data file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the data file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis tool */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the analysis tool */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis tool */,
  "tool_description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis tool */,
  "tool_version" TEXT /* Version of the analysis tool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results_tools" (
  "result_tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result-tool pair */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis result */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis tool */,
  "result_tool_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the analysis result-tool pair */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_results" (
  "report_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report-result pair */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis result */,
  "report_result_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the report-result pair */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faults" (
  "fault_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fault */,
  "fault_name" TEXT /* Name of the fault */,
  "fault_type" TEXT /* Type of the fault (e.g., normal, reverse, strike-slip) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fault_id")
)
